spirit:component.spirit:name: gig_ethernet_pcs_pma_0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sfp
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SFP Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sfp_0
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SFP Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sfp_1
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SFP Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sfp_2
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SFP Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SGMII Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_0
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SGMII Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_1
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SGMII Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_2
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: SGMII Board Interface, between GT and PHY

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: an_interrupt_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Interrupt that Auto Negotiation is complete

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: an_interrupt_port_0
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Interrupt that Auto Negotiation is complete

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: an_interrupt_port_1
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Interrupt that Auto Negotiation is complete

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: an_interrupt_port_2
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Interrupt that Auto Negotiation is complete

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_clk_en_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Clock enables for 10/100 Mbps mode of operation

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_clk_en_0_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Clock enables for 10/100 Mbps mode of operation for lane 0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_clk_en_1_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Clock enables for 10/100 Mbps mode of operation for lane 1

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: sgmii_clk_en_2_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Clock enables for 10/100 Mbps mode of operation for lane 2

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: independent_clk_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Freerunning clock refer to product guide for details

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: independent_clock_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Freerunning clock refer to product guide for details

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: pma_reset_out_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Reset port synchronized to independent clock

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: clk125m_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: 125Mhz clock derived from Synchronous 125Mhz differential clock

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: gtrefclk_bufg_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: gtrefclk through a BUFG to drive fabric logic

xilinx:isEnabled.xilinx:dependency: ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_SUPPORT_LEVEL'))) = false()) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_TRANSCEIVER')) = true())) and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVER_TYPE'))) = "GTXE2") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVER_TYPE'))) = "GTHE2") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVER_TYPE'))) = "GTPE2") ))

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: gtrefclk_bufg_out_port
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: gtrefclk through a BUFG to drive fabric logic

xilinx:isEnabled.xilinx:dependency: (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_SUPPORT_LEVEL'))) = false()) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_TRANSCEIVER'))) and ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "artix7") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "spartan7")) or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z015") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z012s") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z015i")))

(((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVERCONTROL'))) = true()) and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) != "spartan7") and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) != "artix7")) and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z015") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z012s") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z015i") and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_TRANSCEIVER'))) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_8_or_9_family')) = false()))

(((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVERCONTROL'))) = true()) and ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "artix7")) or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "spartan7") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z015") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z012s") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z015i")) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_TRANSCEIVER'))) )

((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_SUPPORT_LEVEL'))) = false()) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_TRANSCEIVER')) = true())) and ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVER_TYPE'))) = "GTXE2")) or (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVER_TYPE'))) = "GTHE2")) or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVER_TYPE'))) = "GTPE2")))

( (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVERCONTROL'))) = true() and ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "zynq") and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z015") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z012s") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7z015i") )) or (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "virtex7") and (not ( ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7v585t") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7vx485t") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xc7v2000t") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xq7v585t") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) = "xq7vx485t") ))) or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "artix7") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "spartan7")))

(((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVERCONTROL'))) = true()) and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) != "artix7")) and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) != "spartan7") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z015") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z012s") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z015i") and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_8_or_9_family')) = false()))

(((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_TRANSCEIVERCONTROL'))) = true()) and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) != "artix7")) and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) != "spartan7") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z015") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z012s") and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_XDEVICEFAMILY'))) != "xc7z015i") and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_8_or_9_family')) = false()))

((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_LVDS'))) =true() and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_IS_SGMII'))) = true()) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_SUPPORT_LEVEL')) = true()) and ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "kintexu")) or (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "virtexu")) or (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "versal")) )) and (not ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ENABLE_ASYNC_LVDS')))))

((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_USE_LVDS'))) =true() and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_IS_SGMII'))) = true()) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_SUPPORT_LEVEL')) = false()) and ((((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "kintexu")) or (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "virtexu")) or (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ARCHITECTURE'))) = "versal")))) and (not ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ENABLE_ASYNC_LVDS')))))

(spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_ENABLE_ASYNC_LVDS'))) and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_RxNibbleBitslice0Used')) = false) and (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_InstantiateBitslice0')) = true)) or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.c_InstantiateBitslice0')) = true) and ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_SUPPORT_LEVEL'))) = false()))) and (not ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_NUM_OF_LANES')) = 1) and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_RXLANE0_PLACEMENT'))) = "DIFF_PAIR_0")))) and (not ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_NUM_OF_LANES')) = 2) and (((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_RXLANE0_PLACEMENT'))) = "DIFF_PAIR_0") or ((spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_RXLANE1_PLACEMENT'))) = "DIFF_PAIR_0")))) and (not (spirit:decode(id('MODELPARAM_VALUE.C_NUM_OF_LANES')) = 3))

spirit:enumeration.spirit:text: 10/100/1000 Mb/s (clock tolerance compliant with ethernet specification)
10/100/1000 Mb/s (restricted tolerance for clocks) OR 100/1000 Mb/s

spirit:component.spirit:description: The 1G/2.5G Ethernet PCS/PMA or SGMII LogiCORE(TM) provides the functionality to implement one of two different specifications: firstly the IEEE 802.3 1000BASE-X specification; secondly the Serial-GMII (SGMII) specification which is closely based on 1000BASE-X. The core provides a choice of physical interface options: a Ten-Bit-Interface (TBI) for connection to an external SERDES; high speed serial functionality using the device specific transceivers in Virtex-7, Kintex-7 and Artix-7; SGMII standard only - LVDS using SelectIO in Kintex-7 devices -2 speed grade and faster. All options provide up to 1/2.5 gigabit per second total bandwidth. When perfoming the SGMII standard, the core can carry Ethernet traffic up to 1/2.5 gigabit per second total bandwidth; this is inclusive of 10Mbps, 100Mbps, 1Gbps and 2.5Gbps Ethernet speeds. The core is designed to interface to the LogiCORE Tri-Mode Ethernet MAC or Zynq Processor subsystem from Xilinx to provide a complete solution.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: ClockSelection
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Clock Source is Synchronous or Asynchronous
